title: Agent Types Schema
description: Defines the available types of agents and their core functionalities

AgentType.description:
Enumeration of supported agent types with their specific purposes:
- qa: Question-answering focused agent
- chat: Conversational interaction agent
- completion: Text completion and generation agent
- function: Function calling and execution agent
- tool: Tool usage and integration agent
- retrieval: Information retrieval focused agent
- classification: Content classification agent

type.description: The specific type of agent being configured
